name: CI burst
interpretation: automated build pipeline with stolen PAT — npm install runs unattended at high frequency

name: Sustained dev workstation
interpretation: developer's machine running multiple npm-install events across different projects through the day

name: Single-shot CI
interpretation: one-off CI build event in private infra; the worm only got one shot

name: Long-tail individual
interpretation: individual developer touching the trojaned package 2-19 times over hours; manual workflow

name: Mixed
interpretation: sustained dev box also running heavy CI loops locally — between dev and CI

name: Single drop
interpretation: one npm-install event, one dropbox; minimal exposure
